scripts.backend: node scripts/venvPython.js -m uvicorn winplate_local_api.main:api --app-dir backend/local-api --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8765 --reload --use-colors --log-config backend/local-api/logging.json
scripts.check: npm run check --workspace @winplate/windows-electron && npm run test:layout && npm test --workspace @winplate/macos-electron-menubar --workspace @winplate/core --workspace @winplate/shared-types --workspace @winplate/icons
scripts.backend:test: node scripts/venvPython.js -m unittest discover -s backend/local-api/tests -t backend/local-api -p "test_*.py"
